title: Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments
description: Adds special spawning methods for Legendaries and Mythicals (Zacian, Zamazenta, Reshiram, Zekrom, Kyurem, Hoopa, Cosmog, Keldeo, Regigigas, All Regis, Cobalion, Virizion, Terrakion, Moltres, Articuno, Zapdos, more soon...)
body:
![LM_Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de47ea6cae48e58fa711bab4a9d26aa8e8b8134.png)



Legendary Monuments is a mod that adds more immersive ways to obtain multiple Legendary and Mythical Pokemon by adding unique summoning mechanics, new structures and new items.

Whether you’re collecting footprints, crafting ancient urns and collecting pokemon souls, or finding your way through a labyrinth or even answering questions, Legendary Monuments makes finding Legendaries fun rather than simply waiting for them to spawn somewhere, sometimes staying afk for hours.


# 📘 [CHECK THE FULL WIKI](https://legendarymonuments.com/)

If you have any questions regarding the mod, that is where you find the answer


## 🔥 Legendary and Mythical Pokémon Structures/Mechanics Included In The Mod:

- **ZAMAZENTA**
- **COBALION**
- **VIRIZION**

**Thanks to Maxolotl who built the Lugia Temple, Giratina Island, all 3 lakes for the Lake Guardians and collaborated with the Snowpoint Temple and Spear Pillar and did some sprites and also all the icons for the structures in the tracking app, and who is actively helping with the mod.**

**Thanks to Sevonents who did the jigsaws and generation for those massive structures in the mod like, the lakes, Snowpoint Temple, Spear Pillar, Giratina Island, Turnback cave, etc, and who is actively helping with the mod.**

**Thanks to Beibeihuli who built the Final Island and helped with Spear Pillar, Turnback Cave and Snowpoint Temple, and made the Palkia, Dialga and Giratina Pedestals, and who is actively helping with the mod.**

**Thanks to GoldXeno07 who made this beautiful hoopa icon and helped out with the pedestals.**

**Thanks to JackJk for the 2 Chinese translations.**

**Thanks to freshwaterset for the Japanese Translation**

**Thanks to Hashiroku for the Russian Translation**

## 📦 Required Mods

# These are required for Legendary Monuments to function properly:

•Cobblemon – The core Pokémon mod

•Chipped – Provides building blocks used in structures

•Accessories – (Needed for Showdown too) Regipauldrons are equipped with it

•Cobblefurnies – We use some decorations from it, like statues

•Cobblemon: Mega Showdown – Adds models, animations, items (like Rusted Sword/Shield), fusions, Dynamax, mega evolution and more

•Terrablender – For the biomes added by the mod


## 💡 Extra Notes

•All Legendaries that have a spawn added by the mod have a 2% chance to be shiny

•One-time summon per player per structure, each player on a server can get 1 legendary from the same pedestal.

•Models for certain Pokémon (like the Swords of Justice) require side mods or resource pack (I recommend All The Mons)


## 📥 Installation

1.	Download the .jar from Modrinth
2.	Drop it into your Minecraft mods folder alongside the required mods
3.	Launch and start your legendary journey!
